title: Show descendant issues in details pane
description: As a user, I want to see the descendant issues of the selected issue in the right-hand details pane, with links to navigate to each descendant.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: Descendant issues in details pane

Scenario: Show descendants for any issue
  Given I am viewing an issue in the details pane
  And the issue has child or descendant issues
  When the details pane renders
  Then I see a list of all descendants
  And each descendant item links to that issue

Scenario: No descendants
  Given I am viewing an issue with no descendants
  When the details pane renders
  Then I see an empty state indicating no descendant issues
